executor_steps: Remove the entire AGREE annex block from component type Q
Add a new AGREE annex block to component implementation Q.Impl containing only the property guarantees
In the new implementation annex, add: assume "data_flow_routing": Data_Sink = Q_Spg.Data_Sink;
In the new implementation annex, add: guarantee "dispatch_protocol": Dispatch_Protocol = Sporadic;
In the new implementation annex, add: guarantee "execution_period": Period = 10;
In the new implementation annex, add: guarantee "deadline_constraint": deadline = 10;
In the new implementation annex, add: guarantee "priority_level": Priority = 1;
